## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the existing file format for its category (skills have "What It Is For" / "When to Use It", agents have "What It Does" / "When It Runs", etc.)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets or credentials
- [ ] All code is TypeScript (not JavaScript)
- [ ] No jargon without explanation
- [ ] Tested in Claude Code
- [ ] One logical change per PR (not bundled with unrelated changes)
